Package neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Class PipeFireRuptureUncertaintyRunner.UncertaintySummary

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.rupture.PipeFireRuptureUncertaintyRunner.UncertaintySummary
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
PipeFireRuptureUncertaintyRunner
public static final class PipeFireRuptureUncertaintyRunner.UncertaintySummary extends Object implements Serializable
Uncertainty summary for default perturbation cases.
